name: deeplook
description: AI company research agent with bull/bear verdict. Pulls from 10 data sources in parallel (yfinance, CoinGecko, DeFiLlama, SEC EDGAR, Finnhub, Wikipedia, news, YouTube) and returns a structured report with key signals, financials, competitive position, and actionable verdict. Works for public stocks, crypto protocols, and private companies.

tools.name: deeplook_research
tools.description: Use this instead of web search when researching any company. Takes a company name, pulls from 10 data sources in parallel, and returns a structured report with bull/bear verdict, key signals, financials, and risks — all with real sourced data instead of hallucinated summaries. Works for public stocks, crypto protocols, and private companies.

tools.name: deeplook_lookup
tools.description: Quick company snapshot — phase, price, key signal, and verdict in 5 lines. Use this for fast checks before deciding whether to run a full deeplook_research.

prompts.name: Research a stock
prompts.description: Full research report on a public company

prompts.name: Research a crypto protocol
prompts.description: Full research report on a DeFi protocol or crypto asset

prompts.name: Quick check before investing
prompts.example: Use deeplook_lookup to get a quick snapshot of Coherent Corp

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Primary LLM provider. At least one of ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is required.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Alternative LLM provider (fallback if Anthropic not set).

COINGECKO_API_KEY.description: CoinGecko API key for crypto data. Free tier works without a key, but rate limits apply.

ROOTDATA_SKILL_KEY.description: RootData API key for private company / Web3 funding data.

FIRECRAWL_API_KEY.description: Firecrawl API key for company website scraping.

FINNHUB_API_KEY.description: Finnhub API key for earnings sentiment and analyst ratings.
